mapper.sql: select id, user_id, profile_snapshot, result_json, rule_version, data_version, is_paid, created_at from recommendation_log
mapper.select: select * from recommendation_log where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into recommendation_log( user_id, profile_snapshot, result_json, rule_version, data_version, is_paid, created_at )values( #{userId}, #{profileSnapshot}, #{resultJson}, #{ruleVersion}, #{dataVersion}, #{isPaid}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update recommendation_log set result_json = #{state} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select result_json from recommendation_log where id = (select max(id) from recommendation_log where result_json like concat('%', #{conversationId}, '%') and rule_version = 'ai-conversation-state')
select id, profile_snapshot, result_json, created_at from recommendation_log where user_id = #{userId} and rule_version = #{ruleVersion} order by created_at desc limit 20
mapper.update: update recommendation_log set result_json = #{resultJson} where id = #{id}
